text:
- Update to 0.22.3
- fix invalid variable and typos in rc.d script
- add a patch which fixes external command to hang
- support old style rc.d scripts (rc.d/foo and rc.d/foo.sh)

Added file(s):
- files/patch-2385
- files/patch-old_rcd_support
